items.title: US, Iran agree to ceasefire as Trump pulls back on threat to destroy Iranian 'civilisation'
items.summary: The US and Iran on Wednesday agreed to a two-week ceasefire, reaching a deal just hours before President Donald Trump's deadline and threatened destruction of Iranian "civilisation" if Tehran failed to unblock the Strait of Hormuz. Details of the Pakistan-brokered agreement are set to be negotiated in Islamabad on Friday. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the truce deal does not include Lebanon.

items.title: French couple return home after three-year detention in Iran
items.summary: Two French nationals, Cecile Kohler and Jacques Paris, touched down in Paris on Wednesday after more than three years in detention in Iran on espionage charges, marking the end of a politically sensitive ordeal that had drawn international concern.

items.title: What we know about Iran’s 10-point plan for ending war with US, Israel
items.summary: Iran proposed a 10-point plan for ending the war with the US and Israel early Wednesday after the establishment of a two-week ceasefire just before a US-imposed deadline and threats to destroy Iranian "civilisation". US President Donald Trump said the plan was "workable", despite several points which Washington had previously said were unfeasible.

items.title: Champions League: Bayern win in Madrid and eye semifinal spot
items.summary: Bayern Munich won 2-1 away at Real Madrid in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals. The second leg will take place in Munich on April 15.

items.title: US-Iran ceasefire ‘a major problem domestically’ for Netanyahu
items.summary: Reporting from Jerusalem, FRANCE 24’s Noga Tarnopolsky says the US-Iran ceasefire is likely to be “a major problem domestically” for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. The right-wing Israeli prime minister’s base “was expecting regime change, was expecting something very dramatic” with the Iran war. The two-week ceasefire agreement falls short of their expectations, Tarnopolsky notes.

items.title: French arms exports to Israel ‘a continuous pipeline of military hardware’
items.summary: Throughout the war in Gaza, France maintained that its exports of military equipment to Israel were solely for defensive purposes or intended for re-export to other countries. A new report by two pro-Palestinian groups argues that French firms and transport hubs have continued to arm Israel’s military operations “through supply chains that have bypassed public scrutiny”.

items.title: Iran portraying ceasefire as 'victory against the United States and Israel'
items.summary: Reporting from Tehran FRANCE 24’s Reza Sayah says Iranian state media is portraying the ceasefire agreement as a “victory against the United States and Israel”. Despite the heavy losses inflicted by massive strikes, the assassination of top leaders, civilian deaths, destruction of infrastructure, “the Islamic Republic is still standing,” says Sayah. “For Iran, survival was always a victory,” he notes.

items.title: Middle East live: Israeli army renews strikes on southern Lebanon after US-Iran truce agreement
items.summary: The Israeli military renewed its strikes on southern Lebanon on Wednesday, state media reported, as Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu insisted the US-Iran ceasefire agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz did not include Lebanon. French President Emmanuel Macron has called for Lebanon’s inclusion in the truce deal. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

items.title: Les États-Unis et l'Iran concluent un cessez-le-feu, le Liban non concerné selon Israël
items.summary: Donald Trump a annoncé mardi qu'il suspendait pendant deux semaines les bombardements contre l'Iran et qu'un cessez-le-feu était conclu, conditionné à la réouverture par Téhéran du détroit d'Ormuz. Le bureau du Premier ministre israélien Benjamin Netanyahu a par la suite souligné que cette trêve "n'inclut pas le Liban".

translation.title: United States and Iran conclude cease-fire, Lebanon not concerned according to Israel
translation.summary: Donald Trump announced on Tuesday that he was suspending the bombings against Iran for two weeks and that a ceasefire was concluded, conditional on Tehran's reopening of the Strait of Ormuz. The Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's office later stressed that this truce "does not include Lebanon".

items.title: Des Iraniens pro-régime manifestent à Téhéran après l'annonce du cessez-le-feu
items.summary: Des Iraniens pro-régime ont manifesté dans la nuit de mardi à mercredi à Téhéran après l'annonce d'un accord de cessez-le-feu de deux semaines. L'événement illustre la colère des partisans d'une ligne dure contre les États-Unis et Israël.

translation.title: Iranian pro-regime protest in Tehran after ceasefire announcement
translation.summary: Pro-regime Iranians demonstrated in the night of Tuesday to Wednesday in Tehran after a two-week ceasefire agreement was announced. The event illustrates the anger of supporters of a hard line against the United States and Israel.

items.title: Levée des sanctions, nucléaire... Que contient le plan iranien en dix points proposé à Trump ?
items.summary: Les États-Unis et l'Iran se sont mis d'accord mercredi pour un cessez-le-feu de deux semaines en échange d'une réouverture du détroit d'Ormuz. Téhéran a transmis une "proposition en dix points" pour la paix, considérée par Washington comme une "base viable pour négocier". Voici ce que l'on sait de cette proposition.

translation.title: Lifting sanctions, nuclear... What is contained in the Iranian 10-point plan proposed to Trump?
translation.summary: The United States and Iran agreed on Wednesday for a two-week ceasefire in exchange for a reopening of the Strait of Ormuz. Tehran transmitted a "ten-point proposal" for peace, considered by Washington as a "viable basis for negotiations". This is what we know about this proposal.

items.title: Aux États-Unis, même les familles de soldats ne sont plus épargnées par l’ICE
items.summary: Aux États-Unis, l'arrestation par l'ICE d'Annie Ramos, épouse d'un militaire, sur une base en Louisiane, est le dernier exemple en date du durcissement de la politique migratoire de l'administration Trump. Libérée après plusieurs jours de détention, la jeune femme reste néanmoins sous la menace d'une expulsion. De plus en plus de familles de soldats, autrefois protégées, sont désormais visées.

translation.title: In the United States, even families of soldiers are no longer spared by ECI
translation.summary: In the United States, the arrest by the ICE of Annie Ramos, wife of a soldier, on a basis in Louisiana, is the latest example of the tightening of the Trump administration's migration policy. Released after several days of detention, the young woman nevertheless remains under threat of expulsion. More and more families of soldiers, once protected, are now being targeted.

items.title: Proposition de loi Yadan: "Un dangereux amalgame"
items.summary: A la Une de la presse, ce mercredi 8 avril, les réactions au retour en France des ex-otages Cécile Kohler et Jacques Paris, après presque 4 ans de détention en Iran. Le nouveau report de l’ultimatum de Trump à Téhéran. La décision du gouvernement britannique d’interdire son territoire à Kanye West pour ses propos antisémites. Trump's new ultimatum postponement in Tehran. The British government's decision to ban its territory in Kanye West for its anti-Semitic remarks. items.title: Can Iran’s environment be saved?
items.summary: Much of the global conversation about Iran revolves around security, conflict, and nuclear risk. What is less discussed is an environmental collapse already unfolding, with consequences that extend well beyond its borders.

items.title: How the war struck Iran’s architecture of repression
items.summary: Israel’s campaign in Iran has reached far beyond missile depots and military command. Over roughly a month, it has also hit the architecture of domestic repression: intelligence compounds, police stations, Basij bases, judicial buildings, and senior officials tied to crackdowns.

The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.

items.title: O sonho cosmopolita entre o inferno da ameaça de Trump e a viagem à Lua
items.summary:
Enquanto escrevo estas palavras, o presidente dos Estados Unidos ameaça uma civilização inteira - palavras dele- de morte. "Não gostaria que isso acontecesse", diz, "mas pode acontecer". Ao ler essa fala, lembro-me de uma das primeiras descrições da excelência na liderança política, escrita precisamente sobre a civilização ameaçada. O autor foi Xenofonte, grego, aluno de Sócrates e mercenário na guerra contra o imperador persa Artaxerxes.
Leia mais (04/07/2026 - 23h00)

translation.title: The cosmopolitan dream between the hell of Trump's threat and the trip to the moon
translation.summary:
As I write these words, the president of the United States threatens an entire civilization - his words - of death. "I wouldn't want that to happen," he says, "but it can happen." In reading this line, I remember one of the first descriptions of excellence in political leadership, written precisely about the threatened civilization. The author was Xenophon, Greek, student of Socrates and mercenary in the war against the Persian emperor Artaxerxes.
Read more (04/07/2026 - 23h00)

Conclusões preliminares de uma investigação da ONU sobre as mortes de três soldados indonésios da Unifil (Força Interina das Nações Unidas no Líbano) no mês passado indicam que um foi morto por um disparo de tanque israelense e outros dois, por um dispositivo explosivo improvisado provavelmente colocado pelo Hezbollah.
Leia mais (04/07/2026 - 21h46)

translation.title: Israel and Hezbollah killed UN soldiers in Lebanon, says inquiry
translation.summary:
Preliminary conclusions of a UN investigation into the deaths of three Indonesian Unifil soldiers (United Nations Interim Force in Lebanon) last month indicate that one was killed by an Israeli tank fire and two others by an improvised explosive device probably placed by Hezbollah.
Read more (04/07/2026 - 21h46)

items.title: Irã chama cessar-fogo de vitória e diz que vai reabrir Hormuz por duas semanas
items.summary:
Poucos minutos após Donald Trump anunciar um cessar-fogo de duas semanas com o Irã, autoridades da República Islâmica deram sua versão do resultado das negociações na noite desta terça-feira (7), que promete ao menos reduzir a tensão global após ameaças do presidente dos Estados Unidos de destruir completamente o país persa.
Leia mais (04/07/2026 - 21h12)

translation.title: Iran calls ceasefire victory and says it will reopen Hormuz for two weeks
translation.summary:
A few minutes after Donald Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran, authorities of the Islamic Republic gave their version of the outcome of the negotiations on Tuesday night (7), which promises to at least reduce global tension after threats from the President of the United States to completely destroy the Persian country.

items.title: Nosso dinheiro está sendo usado para matar nosso povo, dizem iranianos que vivem nos EUA
items.summary:
Iranianos que moram nos Estados Unidos vivem dias de angústia diante da escalada do conflito no Oriente Médio. À distância, acompanham bombardeios, ameaças e, sobretudo, a dificuldade de manter contato com familiares em meio a cortes de internet e risco de colapso de serviços básicos.

translation.title: Our money is being used to kill our people, Iranians say they live in the US
translation.summary:
Iranians living in the United States live days of anguish in the face of the escalation of conflict in the Middle East. From a distance, they follow bombings, threats and, above all, the difficulty of keeping in touch with family members amid internet cuts and risk of collapse of basic services.

items.title: Trump recua de novo e anuncia cessar-fogo de 2 semanas após ameaçar destruir o Irã
items.summary:
Após dizer que "uma civilização inteira morrerá nesta noite" e ameaçar obliterar a infraestrutura civil do Irã, Donald Trump recuou novamente e aceitou nesta terça-feira (7) uma proposta feita pelo Paquistão para um cessar-fogo de duas semanas na guerra iniciada em 28 de fevereiro pelos Estados Unidos e Israel.

translation.title: Trump retreats again and announces ceasefire two weeks after threatening to destroy Iran
translation.summary:
After saying that "an entire civilization will die tonight" and threaten to obliterate Iran's civil infrastructure, Donald Trump retreated and accepted on Tuesday (7) a proposal made by Pakistan for a two-week ceasefire in the war begun on February 28 by the United States and Israel.

items.title: Bombas não vencem o radicalismo islâmico
items.summary: No intuito de eliminar a ameaça do terrorismo islâmico, estamos vendo algumas das cenas mais dantescas das últimas décadas. Durante dois anos Gaza foi impiedosamente bombardeada. Agora, a mesma lógica militar se estende ao Irã e ao Líbano, cujas capitais exemplificam o desastre humanitário que toma proporções alarmantes. translation.summary: In order to eliminate the threat of Islamic terrorism, we are seeing some of the most dangerous scenes of recent decades. For two years Gaza was mercilessly bombed.
